'''zhachuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabophobe|arabophobe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabophobe|arabophobe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhachuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zhæchivith || zhæchivij || zhæchivish || zhæchivi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zhachuchuvuth || zhachuchuvuj || zhachuchuvush || zhachuchuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zhachuvuth || zhachuvuj || zhachuvush || zhachuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zhachufvufth || zhachufvufj || zhachufvufsh || zhachufvuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhachuvuthu || zhachuvuju || zhachuvushu || zhachuvuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhachuvuth || zhachuvuj || zhachuvush || zhachuvu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhachuvuthul || zhachuvujul || zhachuvushul || zhachuvukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhachuvuuthuthu || zhachuvuujuju || zhachuvuushushu || zhachuvuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhachuvuthun || zhachuvujun || zhachuvushun || zhachuvukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhachuvuthuoro || zhachuvujuoro || zhachuvushuoro || zhachuvukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
